---
title: "Node Shapes"
---

*Applies to: [Circle Flow](circle-flow.qmd)*

The node shape is controlled by a modifier class on the `.circle-flow` container. The default is `node-circle`.

## node-circle (default)

Filled circle nodes. No class needed — this is the default.

````markdown
::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::
````

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::

## node-box

Rounded rectangle nodes. Width is `nodeRadius × 1.8`, height is `nodeRadius × 1.2`.

````markdown
::: {.circle-flow .node-box}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::
````

::: {.circle-flow .node-box}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::

## node-none

Text-only nodes with a transparent background. Labels are capped at 80px width regardless of item count.

````markdown
::: {.circle-flow .node-none}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::
````

::: {.circle-flow .node-none}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::
